data.body: 4214 RED EVIDENCE captured: rollback vuln demonstrated against current #664 code. A cert signed by a REVOKED key but binding a pre-revocation merged_log_commit PASSES the gate (exit 0, 'verify-opcert: 1 satisfied'). Proves era-at-merged_log_commit lets a revoked-key holder backdate = the security BLOCK. This is the oracle for Option B: era must anchor on storage anchor S. Removing transitional demo (old schema); dispatching held-out implementer for the full Option B remediation.
